description_long: This is a rugged, vintage-style SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of classic military jeeps. The exterior is finished in a weathered, rusty brown metal, giving it a worn and aged appearance. The vehicle features an open cabin with two front seats, a simple dashboard, and a prominent steering wheel. The front showcases a flat hood with visible latches, round headlights, and a vertical slatted grille. The sides reveal large, exposed wheels with thick, off-road tires and minimal fender coverage, while the rear includes a flat cargo area and a spare tire mount. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for rough urban or off-road environments.
description: A weathered, vintage SUV with a boxy, open design, exposed wheels, and a rusty brown metal finish. It features a utilitarian build with a flat hood, round headlights, and a rear cargo area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat hood, round headlights, vertical grille, and rugged tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, two seats, dashboard, and large off-road tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat cargo area, spare tire mount, and simple rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible steering wheel, open cabin, and rear cargo space.
attribute_wheel_design: solid steel wheels with a simple, utilitarian design and no visible spokes
